full_content:
Owner directive S327 (fourth turn): structural mechanical fix for chronically vague term usage.

Slice 1 deliverables: new managed-rule policy template templates/rules/canonical-terminology-policy.toml (21 generic terms + 7 pinned defaults + 8 Tier A + 13 Tier B); new shared library groundtruth_kb/term_disambiguation.py (API surface + policy load + file-level disable marker honoring; Tier-specific lint logic deferred to Slices 2-3); new registry row rule.canonical-terminology-policy in managed-artifacts.toml; T1 test (8 sub-tests); 95/95 broader sweep passes; ruff clean.

Per Codex GO at bridge/gtkb-gov-term-disambiguation-mechanical-2026-05-02-006.md.
explicit_change_request: Owner approved Disambiguation Slice 1 implementation including DELIB archival via AskUserQuestion at S327. Owner answer: 'Approve plan + proceed (Recommended)'.
change_reason: Archive S327 owner directive driving GTKB-GOV-TERM-DISAMBIGUATION-MECHANICAL per .claude/rules/deliberation-protocol.md.
